message:
beads: sync issue tracker state (dependency rewiring, closures, type corrections)

Updated 11 beads in issues.jsonl reflecting ongoing project triage:

Closed:
- bd-3bwc (§21.2-21.10 Future Work): closed as duplicate of bd-3kp.3
  which already tracks the same future work items for §21.2–§21.10

Reclassified:
- bd-3t3.9 (§5.6.4 RaptorQ-Native SSI Witness Plane): task -> epic,
  reflecting its scope as a parent container for sub-tasks

Priority adjusted:
- bd-3t3.1 (§5.1 MVCC Core Types): priority updated to reflect
  current scheduling needs

Dependency graph rewired (9 beads):
- bd-11x0 (§5.6.3.1 SharedPageLockTable Rolling Rebuild)
- bd-15jh (§7.10-7.11 Two Operating Modes + Native Commit)
- bd-179v (§5.7.1-5.7.2 SSI Witness Objects + Candidate Discovery)
- bd-1hi.10 (Pipelined WAL Repair Symbol Generation §3.4.1)
- bd-1if1 (§5.7.1-5.7.2 SSI Witness Objects ECS Schemas)
- bd-iwu.1 (Layer 1: SQLite Behavioral Compatibility Mode §2.3)
- bd-iwu.2 (Layer 2: BEGIN CONCURRENT with SSI §2.4)
- bd-zcdn (§5.6.5 GC Coordination: Horizon/Scheduling/Pruning)
- bd-3bwc (dependencies cleared on closure)

No code changes — issue tracker metadata only.
